description: Style NoteThis easy-to-wear T-shirt from spykar adds a bold brassy look to your wardrobe. Show off your urban style in this fashionably tailored piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this versatile tee with dark denims and casual shoes.Product DetailsWhite, green, blue and black striped T-shirt,with a round neck, short sleeves, chest buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and branding appliqued above the left hemMaterial and Care100% cotton Hand wash in cold water with mild detergentDo not soak, wring or twistDry in shadeFold and stack to maintain shapeModerate warm ironDo not iron on print or embroiderySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
